_comment: DFAM preset catalog. The DFAM has no patch memory — all presets are Collision rack configurations (apply-preset) or panel-state documents.

presets.name: DFAM Rack Rust Protocol
presets.description: 3-chain Collision Instrument Rack. Chain 0=Hit (membrane transient, A1 locked, fast attack/short decay), Chain 1=Tone (tube + membrane dual resonators, A1 with slight detuning), Chain 2=Noise (bandpass burst, velocity-sensitive, mallet+resonator disabled). Sub-bass weight via low Res 1 Tune. Industrial percussion for Rust Protocol's 95 BPM groove.
presets.notes: Res 1 Tune<Key=0 on all chains — pitch locked to A1 regardless of incoming MIDI note. Chain 2 disables Mallet and Res 1 entirely for pure noise shaping.
